Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ServiceAppointment

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ServiceAppointment
public class ServiceAppointment extends SObject

Java class for ServiceAppointment complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ServiceAppointment">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActualDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActualEndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActualStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AdditionalInformation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Address" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppointmentCategory" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AppointmentCategory" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppointmentCategoryId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppointmentInvitation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}AppointmentInvitation" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppointmentInvitationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppointmentNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AppointmentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApptBookingInfoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ArrivalWindowEndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ArrivalWindowStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CancellationReason" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="City" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Comments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Contact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Country" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DueDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Duration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurationInMinutes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurationType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EarliestStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Email" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Emails" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EngagementChannelType" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}EngagementChannelType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EngagementChannelTypeId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Events" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAnonymousBooking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOffsiteAppointment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Latitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Longitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LookedUpFromActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Notes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NotesAndAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpenActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentRecord" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentRecordId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentRecordStatusCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ParentRecordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchedEndTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchedStartTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceNote" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceResources" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceTerritory" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ServiceTerritory" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceTerritoryId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="State" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Street" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Tasks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TopicAssignments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WaitlistParticipants" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkType" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}WorkType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkTypeId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
